source: SIGER 2.0 — Sistema Integral de Gestión Registral (rpc.economia.gob.mx/siger2)
scope: ARIA-flagged Tier 1-2 vendors with RFC, looked up in Mexico commercial registry
note: Free consultation returns FME + company name + registry office only. Full corporate documents (shareholders, partners) cost $736 MXN/company. FME format: N-YYYY###### = post-2016 electronic filing; integer = pre-2016 paper registry.

red_flags.very_recent_incorporation: Incorporated 2021-2024 but winning billions in government contracts
red_flags.non_cdmx_registry: Registered outside Mexico City but supplying federal agencies — may indicate regulatory arbitrage
red_flags.old_registry_no_n_prefix: Pre-2016 companies (no N- prefix) — longer operating history, less suspicious on incorporation date alone

CFE DISTRIBUCION EMPRESA PRODUCTIVA SUBSIDIARIA DE LA COMISION FEDERAL DE ELECTRICIDAD

red_flags: NOTE: This is a state-owned enterprise (SOE) — subsidiary of CFE created under 2013 energy reform
P3 'monopoly' flag is expected for a state utility
Likely a data/methodology false positive — CFE Distribución is legally a natural monopoly
Recommend exclusion from investigation target list

tier_1_critical.reason: Incorporated Oct 2023, winning 1.07B MXN in health contracts within months. English name. Monterrey registry. Highest suspicion ratio (contract value / company age).
Two related entities, incorporated 2022 and 2024. 2.31B MXN. Institution capture pattern. Possible shell succession.
5.89B MXN. COVID-era company (Jun 2020). Culiacán registry is a significant red flag for federal procurement. SA de CV.
4.73B MXN. Incorporated Nov 2021. P3 monopoly. Short operating history.
3.67B MXN. Incorporated Jun 2022. Pachuca registry. Security services — opaque sector.

tier_2_high.reason: 15.79B MXN (highest absolute value). P2 ghost company. Sep 2018 incorporation. Already in RUBLI ground truth (Case 23).
1.62B MXN. COVID-era Jun 2020. Korean brand name — verify if genuine Hyosung Group subsidiary or name appropriation.
MZT = Mazatlán / Sinaloa connection. 1.09B MXN. Naucalpan registry.

tier_3_monitor: CREATIVIDAD E INTEGRACION EN SERVICIOS MEDICOS (FME 257244) — old company 1999, but 6.70B and P6
ALMACENAJE Y DISTRIBUCION AVIOR (FME 6689) — old company 2000, Querétaro, 3.98B
ICA CONSTRUCTORA (FME N-2017033512) — likely ICA group restructure post-2016 bankruptcy, 44.48B
false_positive: CFE DISTRIBUCION (FME 557931) — state-owned enterprise, legal monopoly by design

summary_statistics.total_contract_value_mxn: ~107 billion MXN across all flagged vendors
